meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Scale Your AI Apps as a Student
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with project scalability. Use our Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build professional-grade AI applications effortlessly.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template solves scalability by decoupling your core logic from brittle boilerplate code. By using a modular architecture paired with Claude Code, you automate the heavy lifting of state management and API orchestration, allowing you to focus purely on building high-impact features that actually work in production.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks crafting a local prototype, only to watch it collapse under the weight of its own complexity. The codebase is a tangled mess of hardcoded variables and fragmented logic, and every time you add a feature, three others break. This is the 'tutorial trap'—where your code survives a demo but dies in the real world.

But the gap between a student project and a production-ready application isn't talent; it's architecture. The Antigravity project template acts as your structural scaffolding, designed to handle growth before you even write your first line of business logic. It’s time to stop hacking your way to a launch and start building with the precision of a senior engineer.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Set up the project structure that enforces clean separation between UI, state, and external AI service wrappers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity template, optimized for TypeScript and modular AI service injection.

steps.title: Define Domain Models
steps.description: Explicitly define your data contracts to prevent 'spaghetti state' as your application scales.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate robust Zod schemas and TypeScript interfaces for the core data entities defined in my feature requirement document.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate models based on schema.txt"

steps.title: Implement Modular Service Layers
steps.description: Decouple your AI providers so you can swap models without refactoring the entire codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an abstraction layer for LLM calls that supports fallback providers and automatic error handling.

steps.title: Automate Integration Testing
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write tests that validate your business logic against the Antigravity template specs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write unit tests for the service layer, ensuring edge cases like API timeouts are handled gracefully.

steps.title: Deploy with Infrastructure as Code
steps.description: Prepare your project for production by generating deployment scripts that mirror your local development environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the necessary configuration files for a containerized deployment of this Antigravity project.

pro_tips: Always treat your API keys as environment-injected variables from day one to avoid accidental leaks.
Use Claude Code to perform a 'refactor audit' every time you finish a major feature module.
Keep your service layer thin; if an AI call exceeds 50 lines of code, split it into smaller, composable functions.
Leverage the Antigravity 'middleware' pattern to intercept and log every prompt/response cycle for debugging.
Prioritize local caching of AI responses to reduce latency and save on API tokens during development.
content.next_steps: Once your project is scaffolded, begin building your first core feature and run a 'claude check' to ensure your implementation adheres to the Antigravity architectural guidelines.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the template, and the roadmap. The only thing missing is your contribution to the ecosystem. Stop waiting for the 'perfect' project and start building the one that defines your career. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
